frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

examples.uk: Коли я увійшов у цей дуже дивний, порожній зал, я мусив уважно й обережно озирнутися навколо.

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

examples.pl: Nieuczciwy polityk zaczął na każdym kroku niepotrzebnie mnożyć bardzo duże, sztuczne problemy dla swoich zaciekłych przeciwników.

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

examples.pl: On w ogóle nie potrafił się otwarcie zgadzać na tak rażące, wielkie i oczywiste niesprawiedliwości w naszym, nowoczesnym społeczeństwie.

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS

frequencySource: KWJP balanced contemporary Polish corpus frequency list, all subcorpora, lemma, infinitive POS
